text: 1. Prayer for a seat in the school hostel Date: 10 March 2026 To The Principal Bangladesh International School Nirjhor Cantonment, Dhaka Subject: Prayer for a seat in the school hostel Sir, With due respect and humble submission, I would  like to inform you  that I am a student of your esteemed institution. I study in Class X and my roll number is 15. I live in a village which is quite far from my school. Every day I have to travel a long distance to attend my classes. As a result, I often face many difficulties on my way to school. Sometimes I arrive late and cannot concentrate properly on my studies because of the tiring journey. Moreover, it is very difficult for me to attend extra classes, group study, and other academic activities after school hours due to the long distance from my residence. If I get a seat in the school hostel, I will be able to live in a peaceful and disciplined environment which will help me concentrate more on my studies. I will also be able to follow the rules and regulations of the hostel strictly and maintain good conduct. My parents are also very eager for me to stay in the hostel so that I can continue my studies in a better way under proper supervision. Therefore, I earnestly request you to kindly grant me a seat in the school hostel. I shall remain ever grateful to you for your kindness. Yours obediently, Anika Class: X Roll: 15

text: 2. Prayer for a full-free studentship. 10th March 2025 The Principal Banani Bidyaniketan School and college Banani Model Town Banani Dhaka-1213 Subject: Prayer for a full-free studentship. Dear sir With due respect, I would like to draw your kind attention to an important matter of mine which I want to resolve with your kind assistance to continue my study. My father is a poor farmer from a remote area. Carrying the expenses of a six-member family including our four siblings is very difficult for him. Besides, along with me, my three siblings are studying in different public universities of the country. Along with other expenses of the family, the educational expenses of my siblings are about forty thousand taka. But my father's income is only thirty thousand taka only. In such a situation, if my educational expenses are added to those expenses, it will be impossible for my father to spend that amount of money. Therefore, I hope, in view of the above circumstances, You would kindly grant me a scholarship of tk.3000 per month from the poor fund of the institution and thus enable me to continue my study. Sincerely yours Amina Class viii, section D

text: 3. Prayer for Issuance of a Transfer Certificate 28 March 2026 The Principal Banani Bidyaniketan School and College Dhaka Subject: Prayer for Issuance of a Transfer Certificate Sir, With due respect and humble submission, I beg to state that I am a regular student of Class, Section, Roll No of your reputed institution. I have been pursuing my studies here with utmost sincerity and discipline. I regret to inform you that my father has recently been transferred to Patuakhali in connection with his official responsibilities. As our family will permanently relocate there, it will be absolutely impossible for me to continue my studies at your esteemed institution. Under the circumstances, I most respectfully request you to kindly issue me a Transfer Certificate at your earliest convenience to enable me to seek admission to a school at my new place of residence. I shall ever remain grateful for your sympathetic consideration and kind cooperation in this regard. Sincerely Yours Disha Class: __________ Roll No: __________ Section: __________

text: 4. Prayer for increasing common room facilities. 25 May 2025 The principal Banani Bidyaniketan school and college Dhaka---1213 Subject: Prayer for increasing common room facilities. Dear sir, with humble submission and veneration, we, the Students of your college would like to draw your gracious attention to the the fact that our college common room is not well-furnished and has not any modern facility. Our common room does not provide much scope of enjoyment and entertainment. Here we do not not get enough facility to enjoy free time as we have not any indoor sports materials such as carom, chess, table tennis etc. Moreover, there are no arrangements of keeping more dailies, magazines, periodical which are part and parcel of academic life. We are also deprived of television, computer and internet facilities. As a result, many of us have to idle away our time. If all the modern amenities are available in our common room, we can keep us engaged and will be able to enrich our extra curricular skill. Under the above circumstances, we pray and hope that your honour would be kind enough to increase common room facilities and thus give us a chance to keep pace with the modern world. yours sincerely, Moni On behalf of the students of BBN school and college

text: 5. prayer for permission to go on a study tour. 10th March 2025 The Principal Banani Bidyaniketan School and college Banani Model Town Banani Dhaka-1213 Subject: prayer for permission to go on a study tour. Dear sir, With due respect, we, the students of your school would like to draw your gracious attention to the fact that we are willing to go on a study tour on 2nd March 2023 to Sonargaon, the ancient capital city of Bengal. We feel that an excursion is part and parcel of study. Mere bookish knowledge does not satisfy our thirst for knowledge, if we do not see things with our own eyes. Such a visit to Sonargaon and Panam Nagar will give us a clear idea about our glorious past and its historical evidences. Many people still visit the historic city of Sonargaon and Panam Nagar which have immense beauty and archaeological relics. The Folklore Museum of Sonargaon houses a variety of artifacts from all over Bangladesh, representing the culture and tradition of indigenous group of people. So this tour will undoubtedly widen our knowledge of history and tradition. It is noted that our teachers have agreed to guide us during the tour and the total costs will be borne by the respective participants. So we need only your permission and hoping you to come with us. Therefore, we pray and hope that your generosity would kindly give us permission and take the necessary arrangements to make the tour a grand success and oblige us hereby in the days to come. sincerely yours, On behalf of the students of BBNSC. Asif

text: 6. An application to the principal for a testimonial for class-IX Date: February 06, 2015 The Headmaster/The Principal Banani Bidyaniketan School and College Banani, Dhaka-1213 Sub: Prayer for a testimonial. Dear Sir, With humble submission and veneration, I like to draw your gracious and generous attention to the fact that I was a regular student of your school in class VIII in the section of G/B in the session of 2013 . I need a testimonial from you to get admission in a new school/college. I have passed JSC with a golden A + and have been awarded talent pole scholarship by Barisal Education Board, Bangladesh. My Board Registration No. was 09878765 and my Board Roll number was 11654322 in the exam year of 2013. From my childhood, I t’s my long cherished dream to get myself admitted into a country -reputed institution like Rajuk College or a cadet college. Now, my JSC result once again stirred me to take my dream into reality. Besides, my father works in the Roads and Highways Department under the Ministry of Communications. Recently, he has been transferred to Dhaka with a departmental promotion. As such, our family has already shifted there. These coincidence gave me much impetus and momentum to seek admission into a renowned college of the capital city, Dhaka. For the reason, I venture to take an admission test in a famous institution in the capital city. So, I need a testimonial from you to be submitted along with the Admission Form. You are requested to do the needful to provide me with the copy of the testimonial mentioning my academic and cocurricular activities during the period of my study in your valued institute. May we therefore, pray and hope that your generosity would kindly issue me a testimonial as early as possible and oblige me hereby in the days to come. Most obediently yours, (signature) Moni/Monir

text: 7. Prayer for setting up a canteen in our campus. Date: July 23, 2015 The principal/ Headmaster Banani Bidyaniketan school & College Banani, Dhaka-1206 Sub: Prayer for setting up a canteen in our campus. Dear sir/Madam, With humble submission and veneration, we, the students of your school like to draw your gracious attention to the fact. It’s a matter of great regret that ours is a reputed institution across the country but we don’t have a canteen in our campus. Our classes begin at 7 am and break up at 3 pm. It is not possible for us to attend classes without a good tiffin. As a result, the students have been facing a great difficulty with the want of a canteen. For the lack of a canteen, the students usually have to take food from the shops of footpath or from outside or from the hawkers. But these foods are not only costly but unhygienic and dirty. On the consequence, most often they have to suffer from mal-digestion, stomachache, diarrhea, dysentery and so many diseases causing from poisonous and adulterated food. Besides, most often we cannot collect the food from outside due to time constraint. So, the necessity of opening/setting up a canteen beggars description. May we therefore, pray and hope that your generosity would kindly do the needful to set up/open a canteen in no time for the greater interest of the students and school as well and oblige us hereby in the days to come. Most obediently yours, On behalf of the students of Banani Bidyaniketan School and College. (signature) Moni/Monir Class: VIII/IX

text: 8. An application to the principal for setting up a computer club 25 June 2015 The Principal Banane Bidyaniketan school and college 23/A Banani Dhaka-1213 Subject : Application for setting up a computer club. Dear sir With due respect, we, the students of your school would like to bring your gracious attention to an urgent subject that we actually feel the necessity of a computer club in our school. We live in the age of science and tech-nology and we can't keep pace with the advancement of modern technology without learning and operating a computer. Computers have brought about a revolutionary change in our practical life. Besides, we will not be able to build up digital Bangladesh without proper knowledge of computer and its operating system. So due to significant importance of computer knowledge in student life, the students of our school are very much interested in learning computer knowledge. We feel that if a computer club is set up, many students will be able to learn how to operate it and be benefited in almost every field, be it education, business or communication. Therefore, in the light of the above context of learning computer based knowledge, we would fervently request you to set up a computer club in our school and oblige thereby. Sincerely yours, Anwar Class-x.Roll No-10 On behalf of the students of BBNSC

text: 9. Write an application to the principal for sitting up a multimedia classroom. 25 July 2025 To The Principal Banani Bidyaniketan School and College Banani Model Town Dhaka- 1213 Subject: Application for setting Up a Multimedia Classroom. Sir, With due respect, I, on behalf of the students of Class XII, would like to draw your kind attention to the need for establishing a multimedia classroom in our college. In this age of technology, multimedia plays a vital role in enhancing the teaching-learning process. Lessons delivered through audio-visual materials are more engaging and easier to comprehend. Complex concepts, especially in subjects like Science, English, and ICT, can be better understood when taught using multimedia tools. Moreover, such a classroom would motivate students to take more interest in their studies and help teachers present lessons more effectively. Many reputed institutions have already introduced multimedia classrooms to adapt to the modern education system. We believe our college, being a leading institution, should also embrace this advancement. Therefore, we sincerely request you to take the necessary initiative to set up a multimedia classroom for the benefit of all students. We shall remain ever grateful for your kind consideration. Sincerely yours, [Your Name] Class: XII Roll No: 105 On behalf of the students of Class XII

text: 10. An application to the mayor for taking steps towards the growth of Aedes mosquitoes in your locality. 26 August 2025 To The Mayor Dhaka North City Corporation Gulshan,Dhaka-1213 Subject: Request for immediate action to control the growth of Aedes mosquitoes in our locality. Sir, With due respect, I would like to bring to your kind attention a matter of grave concern that demands urgent attention. Our locality is currently facing a severe outbreak of Aedes mosquitoes, which has significantly increased the risk of dengue and other mosquito-borne diseases. The unchecked growth of these mosquitoes is largely due to the accumulation of stagnant water in drains, roadside ditches, abandoned containers, and construction sites. The situation has deteriorated to such an extent that daily life has become difficult. Children and elderly people are particularly vulnerable, and several residents are already suffering from dengue-related symptoms. Unless immediate and effective steps are taken, the situation may turn into a severe public health crisis. I, therefore, earnestly request you to take proper measures such as regular cleaning of drains, spraying of mosquito repellents, awareness campaigns, and strict monitoring of mosquito breeding grounds to control the growth of Aedes mosquitoes in our area. I shall remain ever grateful for your kind cooperation. Yours sincerely, [Your Name] [Your Address] [Date] [Contact Number]

text: 11. Write an application to the DC or UNO for repairing a damaged Road. 26 August 2025 To The Deputy Commissioner Dhaka District Dhaka--1000 Subject: Application for Urgent Repair of Damaged Road at Notun Bazar 100 Feet Sir, With due respect, I would like to draw your kind attention to the deplorable condition of the Notun Bazar 100 Feet Road under your jurisdiction. This road, which is a vital route for thousands of commuters every day, has become severely damaged due to continuous heavy rainfall and lack of maintenance. Large potholes, broken surfaces, and waterlogging have made the road almost unusable, causing great difficulty for pedestrians, rickshaws, and vehicles. Accidents are frequent, and emergency services like ambulances and fire trucks also face serious delays. Moreover, the poor condition of the road is creating heavy traffic congestion and posing health risks due to dust and stagnant water. We, the residents and regular users of this road, sincerely request you to take immediate action to repair and restore the Notun Bazar 100 Feet Road. Timely repair work will greatly reduce public suffering and ensure smooth and safe transportation in the area. We hope you will kindly consider our appeal and take necessary steps as early as possible. Yours faithfully, Sultan Ahmed On behalf of the residents of Notun Bazar Dhaka Date: 8 August 2025

text: 12. Write an application to the principal of your school and college for setting up a debating club. 26 August 2025 To The Principal Banani Bidyaniketan School and College Banani, Model Town Dhaka--1213 Subject: Application for Setting Up a Debating Club Sir, With due respect, I, on behalf of the students of your esteemed institution, would like to draw your kind attention to the necessity of establishing a Debating Club in our school and college. Debating is an essential co-curricular activity that helps students develop their communication skills, logical reasoning, critical thinking, and confidence. It also encourages awareness about current affairs and teaches students how to express their views respectfully and persuasively. A formal debating club would offer students the platform to regularly engage in debates, participate in inter-school competitions, and grow into confident and articulate individuals. We also assure you of our full cooperation in organizing and maintaining the club activities effectively. We, therefore, earnestly request you to consider our proposal and take the necessary steps to set up a debating club at your earliest convenience. Sincerely yours, [Your Name] Class: [Your Class] On behalf of the students Date: [Insert Date]

text: 13. Write an application to the principal for setting up an English language club. 26 August 2025 To The Principal Banani Bidyaniketan School and College Banani Model Town Dhaka-1213 Subject: Application for Setting Up an English Language Club. Dear sir, With due respect, I, on behalf of the students of your esteemed institution, would like to request the establishment of an English Language Club in our school and college. As English is an international language and a vital means of communication in today’s world, having a language club will greatly benefit the students in developing their speaking, writing, listening, and reading skills in English. An English Language Club will provide a platform for students to practice English in a creative and interactive way through debates, extempore speeches, storytelling, reading sessions, and drama. This initiative will also help build students’ confidence and prepare them for future academic and professional challenges. We, therefore, earnestly request you to kindly consider our proposal and take the necessary steps to set up an English Language Club in our institution. We are confident that under your guidance, the club will run effectively and achieve its desired goals. Thank you for your kind consideration. Sincerely yours, [Your Name] Class: [Your Class] Roll: [Your Roll] On behalf of the students of Banani Bidyaniketan School and College.

We, therefore, earnestly request you to kindly consider our proposal and take the necessary steps to set up an English Language Club in our institution. We are confident that under your guidance, the club will run effectively and achieve its desired goals. Thank you for your kind consideration. Sincerely yours, [Your Name] Class: [Your Class] Roll: [Your Roll] On behalf of the students of Banani Bidyaniketan School and College.

text: 14. Write an application to the principal of your school and college for setting up a canteen. 10 August 2025 The Principal Ideal School and College Motijhil Dhaka--1000 Subject: Application for setting up a canteen. Sir/Madam, With due respect, I would like to draw your kind attention to the fact that although our school is large and well-facilitated, it lacks a canteen. The absence of a school canteen has long been felt. During the tiffin break, students often have to depend on food from outside vendors, which is neither hygienic nor safe. Moreover, going outside the campus wastes valuable time and exposes students to unnecessary risks. In view of the above, it is imperative to establish a well-equipped and well-maintained canteen within the school premises. Such a canteen would ensure the availability of fresh, nutritious, and hygienic food at reasonable prices. This would not only safeguard students’ health but also contribute to maintaining discipline, as everyone would remain within the school boundary during recess. I, therefore, earnestly request you to take prompt and necessary steps to set up a canteen at the earliest for the greater benefit of the students Sincerely yours, Anika Class– Section Roll —

text: 15. Letter to the Editor To The Editor The Daily Star 32/1Karwan Bazer,Dhaka Subject: Insufficient water supply in Kuril Vishwa Road. Sir, Through the columns of your esteemed daily, I would like to draw the attention of the concerned authority to a serious problem that we, the residents of Kuril Vishwa Road, have been facing for a long time. We hope that by publishing this letter in your widely circulated daily, the concerned authority will take necessary action as soon as possible. Yours faithfully, Disha On behalf of the people of Kuril Vishwa Road, Dhaka Acute Crisis of Water Supply in Kuril Vishwa Road The water supply in Kuril Vishwa Road area is extremely insufficient. Most of the time the supply remains irregular, and even when it comes, the pressure is so low that it cannot meet the needs of the residents. During the summer season, the problem becomes unbearable. Families suffer badly, students cannot concentrate on their studies, and the poor people are the worst victims. Often people have to wait for hours with pitchers and buckets in long queues for a small amount of water. Sometimes they are compelled to buy water at high prices which is beyond the capacity of many. We, therefore, earnestly request the authority of WASA to take immediate steps to ensure an adequate and regular water supply in Kuril Vishwa Road. Only then the suffering of the people will be reduced.

text: 17. Application for Increasing Library Facilities 21 August 2025 The Principal Viqarunnisa Noon School and College Dhaka 1216 Subject: Prayer for increasing library facilities. Dear Sir, With due respect, I, on behalf of the students of your school, beg to state that our school library is rich in books but not sufficient to meet the growing demand of the students. The number of books is very limited compared to the large number of students. Most of the books are old and torn. We do not have enough reference books on science, mathematics, English grammar, general knowledge, and current affairs. Moreover, the number of daily newspapers and magazines is also insufficient. The reading room is small and cannot accommodate more than thirty students at a time, while the need is for at least eighty to one hundred students. As the library is the center of knowledge and plays a vital role in improving the academic standard of the students, it is essential to increase library facilities. Supplying more updated books, reference materials, and daily newspapers will enrich our knowledge. Expanding the reading room and providing more chairs and tables will also help us a lot. Therefore, I earnestly request you to take the necessary steps to increase our library facilities so that we can make the best use of our valuable time in studies. Sincerely yours, Disha Class– 10 On behalf of the students of Viqarunnisa School and College

text: 18. Application for Sending Relief Goods to Flood-Affected People 21 August 2025 The Mayor Dhaka North City Corporation Dhaka. Subject: Prayer for sending relief goods for the flood-affected people. Dear Sir, With due respect, I, on behalf of the people of Amtoli village under Dhaka district , would like to draw your kind attention to the miserable condition of the flood-affected people. Recently, a devastating flood has swept over this region. Houses, roads, schools, and croplands are under water. Many families have become homeless and are passing their days under the open sky without food, pure drinking water, or medical treatment. Children and elderly people are suffering the most. Diseases like diarrhea and fever are spreading alarmingly. The affected people are in great distress. They are badly in need of dry food, pure drinking water, clothes, medicines, and other emergency supplies. Unless immediate steps are taken, their sufferings will increase beyond measure. In these circumstances, we earnestly request you to kindly send sufficient relief goods, medical teams, and necessary support to our flood-affected area at the earliest possible time. Your timely action will save many helpless people from starvation, disease, and untold sufferings. We hope you will take immediate and effective steps to lessen the sufferings of the distressed people. Sincerely yours, Roja On behalf of the flood-affected people Amtoli, Dhaka

text: 19. An application for sending relief goods and medical facilities to flood affected people. 25 November 2025 The Deputy Commissioner Patuakhali. Subject: Request for Relief Goods and Medical Aid for Flood-Affected People Dear sir, I am writing to draw your kind attention to the devastating floods that have recently affected our district, Patuakhali. Due to continuous heavy rainfall and overflowing rivers, many villages have been completely submerged, forcing thousands of families to leave their homes. The flood has destroyed crops, homes, roads, and essential infrastructure, leaving the people in extreme hardship. The situation is particularly alarming for vulnerable groups such as children, the elderly, pregnant women, and the sick. Many families are living in temporary shelters without proper food, drinking water, clothing, or medical care. The lack of proper sanitation and medical facilities is increasing the risk of diseases such as diarrhea, cholera, and other waterborne illnesses. Immediate relief is essential to prevent further suffering and loss of life among the affected people. In view of this urgent situation, I humbly request your esteemed office to provide relief goods and medical assistance to the flood-affected population of our district. Essential items such as food, drinking water, clothing, blankets, and medicines should be distributed as soon as possible to help the victims survive and recover from this disaster. I sincerely hope that your office will take prompt action to assist the flood-affected people of Mirzagonj, Patuakhali. Yours sincerely Asif on behalf of the people of Mirzagonj, Patuakhali

text: 20. Prayer for issuing a library membership card. To The Headmaster Viqarunnisa Noon school and college Bashundhara  branch Dhaka Subject: Prayer for issuing a library membership card. Sir, With due respect, I would like to state that I am a regular student of your school. I am very interested in reading books from our school library. Our library has many useful books on literature, science, history, and general knowledge which are very helpful for improving our knowledge and academic results. I want to borrow books regularly to enrich my knowledge and prepare myself better for my examinations. But I do not have a library membership card yet. Without the card, I am unable to borrow books from the library. I, therefore, earnestly request you to kindly issue me a library membership card as soon as possible so that I can use the library facilities properly. Yours obediently, Anika Class: ___ Roll No: ___ Section: ___ Date: ___
